channel.title: Chrome — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Chrome (chrome).

item.title: CVE-2026-11694 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in ServiceWorker in Google Chrome prior to 149.0.7827.103 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-11690 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Out of bounds read and write in Media in Google Chrome on Mac prior to 149.0.7827.103 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity:…

item.title: CVE-2026-11688 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Inappropriate implementation in SVG in Google Chrome prior to 149.0.7827.103 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-11683 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in WebCodecs in Google Chrome prior to 149.0.7827.103 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-11680 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in Media in Google Chrome on Windows prior to 149.0.7827.103 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-11674 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in Guest View in Google Chrome prior to 149.0.7827.103 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-11673 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in InterestGroups in Google Chrome prior to 149.0.7827.103 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-11670 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in PDF in Google Chrome prior to 149.0.7827.103 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted PDF file. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-11657 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in Payments in Google Chrome on Mac prior to 149.0.7827.103 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-11646 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in ViewTransitions in Google Chrome prior to 149.0.7827.103 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-11644 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in Views in Google Chrome on Linux prior to 149.0.7827.103 allowed an attacker who convinced a user to install a malicious extension to execute arbitrary code via a crafted Chrome Extension. (Chromium security severity: Critical)

item.title: CVE-2026-11643 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in Proxy in Google Chrome prior to 149.0.7827.103 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code via malicious network traffic. (Chromium security severity: Critical)

item.title: CVE-2026-11641 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in Bluetooth in Google Chrome on Windows prior to 149.0.7827.103 allowed a remote attacker who convinced a user to engage in specific UI gestures to execute arbitrary code via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Critical)

item.title: CVE-2026-11639 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in Compositing in Google Chrome on Mac prior to 149.0.7827.103 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Critical)

item.title: CVE-2026-11637 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in Views in Google Chrome on Mac prior to 149.0.7827.103 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Critical)

item.title: CVE-2026-11633 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in Bluetooth in Google Chrome on Mac prior to 149.0.7827.103 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code via a malicious peripheral. (Chromium security severity: Critical)

item.title: CVE-2026-11632 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in TabStrip in Google Chrome prior to 149.0.7827.103 allowed a remote attacker who convinced a user to engage in specific UI gestures to execute arbitrary code via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Critical)

item.title: CVE-2026-11309 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Insufficient policy enforcement in History in Google Chrome prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a remote attacker to perform UI spoofing via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-11308 · 6.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Inappropriate implementation in Extensions in Google Chrome prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed an attacker who convinced a user to install a malicious extension to perform privilege escalation via a crafted Chrome Extension. (Chromium security severity:…

item.title: CVE-2026-11307 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in PDFium in Google Chrome prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted PDF file. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-11306 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in PDFium in Google Chrome prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted PDF file. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-11305 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in PDFium in Google Chrome prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted PDF file. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-11304 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in PDFium in Google Chrome prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a remote attacker to potentially exploit heap corruption via a crafted PDF file. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-11303 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in PDFium in Google Chrome prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted PDF file. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-11302 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Insufficient policy enforcement in Chrome for iOS in Google Chrome on iOS prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a remote attacker to bypass discretionary access control via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-11301 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Inappropriate implementation in LiveCaption in Google Chrome prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a remote attacker to potentially perform out of bounds memory access via malicious network traffic. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-11300 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Inappropriate implementation in Permissions in Google Chrome prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a remote attacker to perform UI spoofing via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-11299 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Integer overflow in Fonts in Google Chrome prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a remote attacker to obtain potentially sensitive information from process memory via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-11298 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Inappropriate implementation in Chrome for iOS in Google Chrome on iOS prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a remote attacker to bypass same origin policy via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-11297 · 7.7 HIGH
item.description: Insufficient validation of untrusted input in Reader Mode in Google Chrome on Android prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a local attacker to bypass navigation restrictions via a malicious file. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-11296 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Inappropriate implementation in ImageCapture in Google Chrome prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to perform privilege escalation via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-11295 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Inappropriate implementation in WebView in Google Chrome on Android prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a remote attacker to perform privilege escalation via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-11294 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Inappropriate implementation in Passwords in Google Chrome prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a remote attacker to perform UI spoofing via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-11293 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in Input in Google Chrome prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a remote attacker to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-11292 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Insufficient policy enforcement in Blink in Google Chrome prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a remote attacker to bypass content security policy via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-11291 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Inappropriate implementation in Android Autofill in Google Chrome on Android prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a remote attacker to bypass same origin policy via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-11290 · 5 MEDIUM
item.description: Integer overflow in WebView in Google Chrome on Android prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a local attacker to cause a denial of service via a malicious file. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-11289 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Side-channel information leakage in Paint in Google Chrome prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a remote attacker to leak cross-origin data via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-11288 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Insufficient policy enforcement in CSS in Google Chrome prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a remote attacker to leak cross-origin data via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-11287 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Insufficient policy enforcement in Navigation in Google Chrome on Android prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to bypass navigation restrictions via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity…

item.title: CVE-2026-11286 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Insufficient validation of untrusted input in Wallet in Google Chrome prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to perform UI spoofing via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-11285 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Inappropriate implementation in Chrome for iOS in Google Chrome on iOS prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a remote attacker to perform UI spoofing via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-11284 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Side-channel information leakage in PerformanceAPIs in Google Chrome prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a remote attacker to leak cross-origin data via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-11283 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Insufficient validation of untrusted input in Shortcuts in Google Chrome on Mac prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a remote attacker to bypass navigation restrictions via a malicious file. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-11282 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Insufficient policy enforcement in Sandbox in Google Chrome on Linux prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a remote attacker to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-11281 · 5 MEDIUM
item.description: Integer overflow in Chromoting in Google Chrome on Windows prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a local attacker to obtain potentially sensitive information from process memory via a crafted ETW event. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-11280 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Inappropriate implementation in Signin in Google Chrome on iOS prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a remote attacker to perform UI spoofing via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-11279 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Out of bounds read in DevTools in Google Chrome prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-11278 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Inappropriate implementation in CustomTabs in Google Chrome on Android prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a local attacker to leak cross-origin data via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-11277 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Insufficient policy enforcement in Chrome for iOS in Google Chrome on iOS prior to 149.0.7827.53 allowed a remote attacker to bypass discretionary access control via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Low)
